title: Dividend Intelligence — Morningstar-style dividend analytics (yield, growth, safety, DDM, income)

observation.gap_identified: Morningstar competitive gap: no dividend analytics. Retail investors care deeply about yield, dividend safety, growth history, and income projections. Bloomberg PORT and Morningstar both provide this; Aegis had nothing.

implementation.feature_built: Full dividend intelligence service: trailing/forward yield, 1Y/3Y/5Y/10Y growth CAGR, earnings + FCF payout ratios, composite safety score (0-100) with grades, consecutive growth year tracking with Aristocrat/Contender/Challenger classification, Gordon Growth DDM intrinsic value, forward income projection per $10k invested, payment frequency detection, ex-dividend dates, 20-payment history. Wired into stock analysis (per-ticker enrichment), screener (yield + safety columns), dedicated API endpoint, and frontend typed API client.

limitations: DDM is single-stage Gordon Growth — multi-stage (H-model) would be more accurate for high-growth stocks
Safety score uses yfinance fundamentals which can have gaps for some tickers
Aristocrat status is computed from available yfinance history, not official S&P list
assessment.self_critique: Could have added a two-stage DDM for growth stocks where near-term growth differs from terminal. Could also add dividend calendar view (upcoming ex-dates across portfolio). The income projection could be more sophisticated with dividend growth projections over time.

next_steps: Build portfolio-level dividend analytics (aggregate yield, income calendar, sector diversification of income)
Add two-stage H-model DDM for growth stocks
Create dividend screener (filter by yield, growth, safety, classification)
Add DRIP return calculator (reinvested dividend compounding)
Frontend: dividend dashboard component for stock detail page
